name: linear-ai
description: Linear issue intake, setup checks, status detection, refinement, implementation, and review workflows for AI-assisted delivery.

interface.shortDescription: Create, inspect, refine, implement, and review Linear issues.
interface.longDescription: Workflow skills and local validators for Markdown-first Linear issue setup checks, status detection, intake, implementation planning, agent execution, dashboard progress, and review handoff.
